case_title: SELLHORN, HANS W. vs. CLOUD, ANDRE R.

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CLOUD, ANDRE R.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CLOUD, ANDRE R. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CLOUD, ANDRE R.

M8/#624, JUDGE W DOUGLASS, CSR R BARULICH, CLK H HAMILTON 1400 CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF, WHO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT IN PROPRIA PERSONA. SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT BY STIPULATION FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITUTION OF 570 O'FARRELL ST. #212 & MONEY JUDGMENT FOR $1045. JUDGMENT STAYED, AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO MAKE THE FOLLOWING PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF THROUGH PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ON THE FOLLOWING DATES: 6-26-98, $665; 7-10-98, $285; 7-24-98, $285; 8-7-98, $380. (REPRESENTING BALANCE DUE AND BACK OBLIGAITONS); 8-21-98, $380. (RENT WILL BE CURRENT & 2 WKS IN ADVANCE). DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE BY 9-7-98, AND PAY RENT UNTIL DUE SHOULD DEFENDANT COMPLY, JUDGMENT WILL BE SET ASIDE & CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SHOULD DEFENDANT FAIL TO COMPLY, JUDGMENT MAY BE APPLIED FOR EX PARTE WITH 24 HOURS NOTICE, AND WILL INCLUDE THE STIPULATED AMOUNT OF $650. IN ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS. MR. MENDEZ WILL PREPARE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLHORN, HANS W. AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUD, ANDRE R. SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLHORN, HANS W. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-18-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 624 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-24-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
